commit_scope: Update public and Hostinger deploy verification for the workspace vitality BML template handler, and align kernel-router ingress with BML GET/read routes.

local_validation.notes: The old Hostinger Auto Deploy run for f6659da15b56 failed after PR #2996 because the deploy verifier still expected X-Form-Handler: api_vitality_coherence_network. Production already returned X-Form-Handler: api_workspace_vitality with X-Form-Router: native-kernel and X-Form-Python-Authority: false. The patched local public verifier passed end to end against deployed SHA f6659da15b56151ec45b4b20215674550b04f50d. Hostinger form path coverage now reports 61 BML GET/read routes and PASS, including PathRegexp(`^/api/workspaces/[^/]+/vitality$`).

deploy_validation.notes: Pending new Hostinger Auto Deploy run after merge.

phase_gate.notes: Local and public verifier proof passed; CI and post-merge deploy rerun are pending.

evidence_refs: Hostinger Auto Deploy run 27464620212 failed on stale vitality handler expectation after PR #2996.
scripts/test_hostinger_deploy_form_paths.sh: BML GET/read ingress coverage: 61 routes; PASS.
verify_web_api_deploy.sh: Deployment verification passed; public API/web reachable and CORS aligned.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Deploy verification accepts the new api_workspace_vitality BML handler and Traefik ingress covers the generic workspace vitality route pattern.
test_flows: Public verifier sees /api/workspaces/coherence-network/vitality with native-kernel router, api_workspace_vitality handler, and python_authority=false.
Hostinger deploy path test confirms all BML GET/read routes have kernel-router ingress coverage.
